svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="端到端业务流程" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-864" dy="-233" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1680" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=26;fontColor=#101828;fontStyle=1;" value="AdOps Copilot 投放归因排障端到端业务流程" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="900" x="40" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontColor=#475467;fontStyle=0;" value="更新后流程强调：固定 workflow + 规则层负责稳定性；LLM 只用于路由候选、Query 改写、证据解释、知识回答和安全表达整理。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="1260" x="40" y="66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l1" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;startSize=34;horizontal=1;rounded=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#EFF8FF;strokeColor=#2E90FA;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;fontColor=#101828;container=1;recursiveResize=0" value="入口与总控：确定性前置 + LLM 路由候选" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="1600" x="40" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n1" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EFF8FF;strokeColor=#2E90FA;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="用户问题
MMP installs 低于平台" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="190" x="80" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n2" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECFEFF;strokeColor=#06B6D4;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="session_init
trace + 页面上下文" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="190" x="310" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n3" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECFEFF;strokeColor=#06B6D4;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="pre_guard

intent / entities / risk_signals" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="230" x="770" y="48" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n5" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFBEB;strokeColor=#F59E0B;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="schema_guard
JSON / enum / tool 白名单" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="210" x="1040" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n6" parent="l1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFBEB;strokeColor=#F59E0B;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="rule_normalizer
risk_final / confidence_final" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="64" width="230" x="1290" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;startSize=34;horizontal=1;rounded=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#F97316;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;fontColor=#101828;container=1;recursiveResize=0" value="Workflow 执行：固定核查清单 + RAG/工具信息供给" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="230" width="1600" x="40" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n7" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFBEB;strokeColor=#F59E0B;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="workflow_dispatcher
选择固定 workflow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="210" x="80" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n8" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#F97316;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="固定核查清单

中英 query + 实体过滤" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="84" width="240" x="610" y="58" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n10" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#F97316;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="RAG 检索 + Rerank
SOP / 口径 / 历史案例" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="240" x="890" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n11" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF7ED;strokeColor=#F97316;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="只读工具查询
平台报表 / MMP / Postback" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="68" width="250" x="1170" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n12" parent="l2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFBEB;strokeColor=#F59E0B;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="Evidence Builder
引用与工具结果归一" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="260" x="680" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;startSize=34;horizontal=1;rounded=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#F5F3FF;strokeColor=#8B5CF6;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;fontColor=#101828;container=1;recursiveResize=0" value="诊断交付与治理：规则安全检查 + 离线评测回流" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="1600" x="40" y="570" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n13" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECFDF3;strokeColor=#22C55E;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="场景诊断 LLM
原因排序 / 已排除项 / next actions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="80" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n14" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FEF3F2;strokeColor=#F04438;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="delivery_guard 规则
越权 / 敏感字段 / 无证据强答" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="390" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n15" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ECFDF3;strokeColor=#22C55E;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="安全交付整理 LLM
内部摘要 / 脱敏表达" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="250" x="700" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="n16" parent="l3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EFF8FF;strokeColor=#2E90FA;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="诊断卡展示

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #101828;
display: inline-block; font-size: 26px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#101828, #d4dae8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: AdOps Copilot 投放归因排障端到端业务流程
